parents.subject: LU-14428 libcfs: separate daemon_list from cfs_trace_data

commit.subject: LU-15269 tests: sanity-flr/200 to make new temp files
commit.message:
LU-15269 tests: sanity-flr/200 to make new temp files

sanity-flr/200 should make new ctrl_file and lock_file each time.
then it can be used with ONLY_REPEAT. otherwise the files are
removed at the end of the subtest and subsequent run doesn't
work properly.

Test-Parameters: trivial
Signed-off-by: Alex Zhuravlev <bzzz@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: I8cf4c4a97ffeb3ab82ada34a89c98e5bf99294da
